message:
chore(gitignore): ignore Vercel cache and local env files

Adds entries to prevent committing:
- .vercel/ - Vercel CLI cache and deployment artifacts
- .env*.local - Local environment overrides (e.g., .env.local,
  .env.development.local, .env.production.local)

These are environment-specific files that should not be tracked:
- .vercel contains deployment state and cached build outputs
- .env*.local files contain developer-specific secrets and config

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
